calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:30am
Judge Pro Tem David M. Porter, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. Respondents Amy E. Gardner, Anne E. Wight and Alfred Purcell, appear with counsel, Kelly Rossevelt. Ms. Rosenthal presents an oral motion to dismiss the appeal as being untimely. The Court submits the motion, and proceeds with the appeal hearing. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Porter.
9:55am
Court takes a brief recess to hear another matter.
10:20am
Court resumes, all present
1:05pm
The Court indicates it will continue the matter. The Appellant is told she can not return with a witness or any new evidence, since she had not appeared with either on the noticed Mar-10-10, Appeal hearing date. The continued date remains to be determined by JPT Porter.
1:10pm
The matter is submitted until then. Judge Porter retains all new evidence, none of it was marked or identifed, in spite of requests by the clerk.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-18-2009 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Reset From Nov-12-09 To Dec-17-09 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
